broad_results.title: Aerodrome (AERO) Token Smart Contract Audit - EtherAuthority
broad_results.content: According to the standard audit assessment, the Customer`s solidity smart contracts are “Secured”. Also, these contracts contain owner control, which does not make them fully decentralized.

broad_results.title: Aerodrome - detailed report | DeFiSafety
broad_results.content: The documents identify software architecture and contract interaction through any of the following: diagrams, arrows, specific reference to software functions or a written explanation on how smart contracts interact. ... Protocols receive a "no" if none of these are included. 8. Does the software documentation fully cover the deployed contracts' source code? (%) ... There is no software documentation. In the security section, the devs say Aerodrome and Velodrome are identical.

broad_results.title: GitHub - aerodrome-finance/contracts: Aerodrome Finance Smart Contracts · GitHub
broad_results.content: Gauges are attached to a Pool and based on the (ve)NFT votes it receives, it distributes proportional emissions in the form of protocol tokens. Deposits to the gauge take the form of LP tokens for the Pool. In exchange for receiving protocol emissions, claims on fees from the pool are relinquished to the gauge. Standard rewards contract.
